{"query":"Shein carbon neutral Weilong Zhaoqing logistics park FY2024","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1598,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://earth.org/fast-fashion-giant-sheins-emissions-balloon-in-2024/","title":"Emissions of Fast Fashion Giant Shein Balloon in 2024 | Earth.Org","content":"Fast fashion retail giant Shein’s carbon footprint increased significantly in 2024, according to the company’s sustainability report.
Supply chain emissions represented the largest share of the company’s emissions at 11,201,419 metric tons of carbon dioxide equivalent (mtCO2e), a 9.7% jump compared to 2023.
These rose 13.7% to 8,519,829 mtCO2e last year – the equivalent of nearly 2 million gas-powered vehicles driven for one year.
The Singapore-headquartered company ranked among the worst fast fashion retailers for emissions reduction and sustainability efforts and as the top polluter.
“If SHEIN were a country, it would be the 100th biggest emitter in the world, almost as much pollution as the entire country of Lebanon, having increased Scope 3 emissions by over 170% in just two years,” the report said."},{"url":"https://www.reuters.com/sustainability/climate-energy/fast-fashion-retailer-shein-reports-transport-emissions-up-137-2024-2025-06-13/","title":"Fast-fashion retailer Shein's transport emissions jump in 2024 | Reuters","content":"Shein's 2024 transport emissions more than triple Inditex's
LONDON, June 13 (Reuters) - Shein's carbon emissions from transporting products climbed 13.7% in 2024, the online fast-fashion retailer's sustainability report showed on Friday, and its 2023 transport emissions were 18% higher than previously reported after a recalculation.
Shein uses mainly air freight to send cheap clothes directly from suppliers in China to shoppers in 150 markets worldwide, a more carbon-intensive supply chain model compared with traditional apparel retailers that ship more of their products on container vessels.
Founded in China and headquartered in Singapore, Shein sources most of its products from 7,000 suppliers in China, but also has a growing network of factories in Brazil and Turkey.
Shein's emissions reduction targets, approved last month by the Science-Based Targets Initiative, are for a 25% reduction in Scope 3 (indirect) emissions by 2030, compared with 2023."},{"url":"https://www.linkedin.com/posts/swapbonnee_shein-is-struggling-to-clean-up-its-dirty-activity-7341830741179133953-haOW","title":"SHEIN's emissions jump 23% to 26 million tonnes | BONNEE | The Clothing Swap App posted on the topic | LinkedIn","content":"SHEIN's emissions jump 23% to 26 million tonnes
Through direct action, the company has reduced more than 32,000 tonnes of carbon dioxide equivalent emissions at the source.
Despite net-zero goals approved by SBTi, critics question the feasibility due to rising emissions and reliance on Scope 3 reductions.
France’s pushback against Shein’s ultra-fast fashion model is about far more than one retailer.
At the same time, Shein faces international scrutiny, with the OECD highlighting its failures on labour rights, wages and transparency."},{"url":"https://supplychaindigital.com/news/why-is-shein-facing-scepticism-despite-sbti-approval","title":"SHEIN’s Net Zero Goal Validated Including Scope 3 Targets | Supply Chain Digital","content":"May 30, 2025 — SHEIN plans a 42% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2030, and a 25% cut in Scope 3 emissions from its supply chain, alongside ...Read more
Global fast fashion brand SHEIN says it has reached a milestone in its climate strategy following its net zero emissions targets gaining validation from the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi).
SHEIN plans a 42% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2030, and a 25% cut in Scope 3 emissions from its supply chain, alongside transitioning to 100% renewable electricity across all operations.
The company’s long-term goal is to cut emissions across all scopes by 90% by 2050.
Mustan Lalani, Global Head of Sustainability at SHEIN, elaborates on the company’s targets: “SBTi’s validation of our net-zero targets marks an important step in SHEIN’s decarbonisation journey.
Optimising logistics and packaging to cut down transport emissions."},{"url":"https://uk.fashionnetwork.com/news/Fast-fashion-retailer-shein-s-transport-emissions-jump-13-7-in-2024,1740484.html","title":"Fast-fashion retailer Shein's transport emissions jump 13.7 ...","content":"Jun 15, 2025 — Shein's carbon emissions from transporting products climbed 13.7% in 2024, its 2023 transport emissions were 18% higher. FY2024, a step forward in our journey to reduce our emissions.","score":0.885404,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.theglobeandmail.com/business/article-fast-fashion-retailer-sheins-transport-emissions-jump-137-per-cent-in","title":"Fast-fashion retailer Shein's transport emissions jump 13.7 ...","content":"Shein's carbon emissions from transporting products climbed 13.7 per cent in 2024, the online fast-fashion retailer's sustainability report","score":0.609455,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.reuters.com/sustainability/climate-energy/fast-fashion-retailer-shein-reports-transport-emissions-up-137-2024-2025-06-13","title":"Fast-fashion retailer Shein's transport emissions jump in 2024","content":"Exclusive news, data and analytics for financial market professionals Learn more about Refinitiv. ## Browse World. ## Browse Business. ## Browse Sustainability. *   Shein transport emissions up 13.7% in 2024. LONDON, June 13 (Reuters) - Shein's carbon emissions from transporting products climbed 13.7% in 2024, the online fast-fashion retailer's sustainability report showed on Friday, and its 2023 transport emissions were 18% higher than previously reported after a recalculation. Emissions from transporting products to and between Shein facilities, and to customers, including returns, were 8.52 million metric tons of CO2 equivalent in 2024, up from 7.49 million metric tons of CO2e in 2023, according to the report. Shein's transport emissions for 2024 are more than three times those of Zara owner Inditex, which reported 2.61 million tons of CO2e for its 2024 financial year, a 10% increase on 2023 as the Spanish firm also used more air freight. *   About Reuters, opens new tab.","score":0.5957048,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://ww.fashionnetwork.com/news/Fast-fashion-retailer-shein-s-transport-emissions-jump-13-7-in-2024,1740353.html","title":"Fast-fashion retailer Shein's transport emissions jump 13.7 ...","content":"Shein's carbon emissions from transporting products climbed 13.7% in 2024, It increased its use of sea freight and trucking in 2024, 8.52","score":0.5849357,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":0.81,"request_id":"897cb6e3-a745-452b-a076-2e1711cc396e"}
